mapper.sql:
SELECT A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID , A.ASMT_ID , A.STD_ID , INFO.DEPTNM , INFO.USERNM , STD.USER_ID , A.SBMSN_TYCD , A.TEAM_ID , A.SBMSN_CTS , A.SBMSN_TXT , A.SCR , A.SBMSN_STSCD , ( SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'ASMNT_SUBMIT_CD' AND CD = A.SBMSN_STSCD AND ORG_ID = #{orgId}) AS ASMNT_SUBMIT_STATUS_NM , A.SBMSN_CNT , A.CNTN_IP , A.EVLYN , A.SCR_MEMO , A.DELYN , A.EXLN_ASMTYN , A.RESEND_YN , A.KONAN_MAX_MOSART , A.RGTR_ID , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.MDFR_ID AS FILE_RGTR_ID , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' THEN B.MOD_DTTM ELSE null END AS FILE_REG_DTTM , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'SUBMIT' THEN SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 7, 2) || ' ' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 11, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 13, 2) ELSE '' END AS submitDttm , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN B.MOD_DTTM ELSE null END AS lateDttm , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'LATE' THEN SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 7, 2) || ' ' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 11, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 13, 2) ELSE '' END AS lateDttmFmt , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'RE' THEN B.MOD_DTTM ELSE null END AS reDttm , CASE WHEN A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'RE' THEN SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 1, 4) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 5, 2) || '.' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 7, 2) || ' ' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 11, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(B.MOD_DTTM, 13, 2) ELSE '' END AS reDttmFmt , ( SELECT T.teamnm FROM TB_LMS_TEAM T WHERE T.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID) AS teamnm , ( SELECT T.ROLE FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR T WHERE T.TEAM_ID = A.TEAM_ID AND T.STD_ID = A.STD_ID ) AS ROLE , ( SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(T.SCR)),0) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.RGTR_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N') ) AS EVL_SCR , ( SELECT COUNT(RGTR_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_MTL_EVL T WHERE T.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND T.RGTR_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE SBJCT_ID = STD.SBJCT_ID AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND AUDITYN = 'N') ) AS EVAL_CNT , ( SELECT COUNT(ASMT_FDBK_ID) FROM TB_LMS_ASMNT_FDBK WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND DELYN = 'N' ) AS FDBK_CNT , NVL(STD.SCYR,'-') SCYR , NVL(INFO.ENTR_YY,'-') ENTR_YY , NVL(INFO.ENTR_HY,'-') ENTR_HY , NVL(INFO.ENTR_GBN,'-') ENTR_GBN , NVL(INFO.ENTR_GBN_NM,'-') ENTR_GBN_NM , INFO.PHT_FILE AS PHT_FILE_BYTE , (SELECT FILENM FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILENM , (SELECT CONCAT(FILE_PATH, '/', FILE_SAVENM) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILE_PATH , (SELECT CONCAT(FILE_PATH, '/', THMB_FILE_PATH) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID AND (THMB_FILE_PATH IS NOT NULL AND THMB_FILE_PATH != '') ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH , (SELECT FILE_EXTNM FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID ORDER BY FILE_ID LIMIT 1) AS FILE_EXTNM , NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN MRK_OYN = 'Y' THEN CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, NOW(), STR_TO_DATE(SEND_END_DTTM,'%Y%m%d%H%i%s')) < 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_LMS_ASMT WHERE ASMT_ID = A.ASMT_ID), 'N') AS ASMNT_SCORE_OPEN_YN , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LMS_ATFL WHERE ATCL_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) AS FILE_CNT , STD.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE ORG_ID = STD.ORG_ID AND CTGRCD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD' AND CD = STD.GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD) AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT STD ON STD.STD_ID = A.STD_ID AND STD.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND STD.AUDITYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT LOGIN ON STD.USER_ID = LOGIN.USER_ID AND LOGIN.ACNT_STSCD = 'U' JOIN TB_LMS_USR INFO ON STD.USER_ID = INFO.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ASMNT_SBMT_FILE B ON A.ASMT_SBMSN_ID = B.ASMT_SBMSN_ID WHERE A.ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND A.DELYN = 'N'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD IN ('SUBMIT','RE')
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'Y'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'NO' AND A.RESEND_YN = 'N'
AND A.EVLYN = 'Y'
AND A.EVLYN = 'N'
AND A.RESEND_YN = 'Y' AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = 'RE'
AND A.SBMSN_STSCD = #{searchKey}
AND ( LOWER( INFO.DEPTNM ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER( INFO.USER_ID ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER( INFO.USERNM ) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
AND A.EVLYN = #{searchKey3}
AND STD.STD_ID IN (SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE REEXAMYN = 'Y' AND EXAM_ID = NVL((SELECT EXAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_BSC WHERE EXAM_CTGRCD = 'EXAM' AND EXAM_SBST_REF_ID = A.ASMT_ID AND DELYN = 'N'), ''))
mapper.select:
/* SQL ID : AsmntProIndiDAO.selectList 설 명 : 과제 제출 목록 */ SELECT RT.* , (SELECT MOBILE_NO FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RT.USER_ID) AS MOBILE_NO , (SELECT EMAIL FROM TB_LMS_USR WHERE USER_ID = RT.USER_ID) AS EMAIL
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USER_ID) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM) AS LINE_NO
, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO
, COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT
ORDER BY RT.USER_ID
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN RT.FILE_REG_DTTM IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), RT.FILE_REG_DTTM
ORDER BY RT.USERNM

/* SQL ID : AsmntProIndiDAO.selectListPaging 설 명 : 페이징 */ SELECT RT.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY RT.USERNM) AS LINE_NO , COUNT(RT.ASMT_SBMSN_ID) OVER() AS TOTAL_CNT FROM ( ) RT ORDER BY RT.USERNM LIMIT #{firstIndex}, #{listScale}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : AsmntProIndiDAO.updateScoreExcel 설 명 : 과제 대상자 성적 수정(엑셀) */ UPDATE TB_LMS_ASMT_SBMSN SET MDFR_ID = #{userId} , MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , SCR = ( SELECT CASE WHEN #{SCR} < 0 THEN 0 WHEN #{SCR} > 100 THEN 100 ELSE #{SCR} END SCR FROM DUAL ) , EVLYN = 'Y' WHERE ASMT_ID = #{asmtId} AND STD_ID = ( SELECT STD_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT WHERE USER_ID = #{stdNo} AND ATNDLC_STSCD = 'S' AND SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd})
